# Description

Clean up .audiagentic/interoperability/

# Acceptance Criteria

- Files reviewed and organized
- Dependencies documented

# Notes

Part of request-19 code standards compliance cleanup.

# Completion Notes

Directory already clean and well-organized:
- config.yaml: Properly configured with all required settings
- events.yaml: Comprehensive event registry documentation
- AUTO_STATE_GUIDE.md: Auto-state propagation guide
- event-standards.md: Event standards documentation
